name: x402-crypto-price-tracker
description: Agent-payable crypto market data and revenue intelligence over HTTP 402/x402. 7 paid endpoints ($0.01-$1.00 USDC on Base), 4 MCP tools (revenue scanner, x402 auditor, bounty finder, dealwork scout). No API keys — agents pay per call via EIP-3009.

tools.name: scan_revenue_surfaces
tools.description: Rank current agent monetization surfaces with immediate actions.

tools.name: audit_x402_endpoint
tools.description: Audit an x402 endpoint for discovery, robots, manifest, paid-route, and stable-domain readiness.

tools.name: find_bountybook_jobs
tools.description: Find BountyBook jobs likely to pass oracle verification.

tools.name: find_dealwork_low_competition
tools.description: Find low-competition DealWork opportunities and bid recommendations.
